channel.title: Mastodon on Piecewise
channel.description: Recent content in Mastodon on Piecewise

item.title: (interaction) status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block (Un)favorite/(un)boost a status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description interaction any ✓ The action to perform. status status ✓ The status to (un)favorite or (un)reblog. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: (interaction) user (user)
item.description: In Mastodon → Users Jump to block (Un)follow, (un)block, or (un)mute a user. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description interaction any ✓ The action to perform. user user ✓ The user to (un)follow, (un)block, or (un)mute. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs

item.title: (property) count of user (user)
item.description: In Mastodon → Users Jump to block Find a countable property of a user. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description property any ✓ The property to get. user user ✓ The user to get the property of. Output Number - The specified property. window.

item.title: (property) of user (user)
item.description: In Mastodon → Users Jump to block Find a property of a user. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description property any ✓ The property to get. user user ✓ The user to get the property of. Output String - The specified property. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: (scope) scope
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Describe who can view a particular status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description scope any ✓ The scope. Output scope - The specified scope. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: (type) content of status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Get the content of a status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description type any ✓ The type of output to return. status status ✓ The status to extract content from. Output String - The content of the status, as the selected type.

item.title: attachment with location (attachment)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Specifies an item to attach to a status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description attachment String ✓ A path or a URL to the attachment to send Output attachment - An attachment based on the path or URL provided.

item.title: attachments in status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Get the attachments of a status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description status status ✓ The status to get the attachments of. Output Array - A list of URLs of the attachments of the status. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: author of status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Get the author of a status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description status status ✓ The status to get the author of. Output user - The author of the status. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.

item.title: delete status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Delete a status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description status status ✓ The status to delete. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.

item.title: emoji of reaction (reaction)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Get the emoji of a reaction. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description reaction pleroma_reaction ✓ The reaction to get the emoji of. Output String - The emoji of the reaction. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.

item.title: emoji reactions on status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Get the emoji reactions on a status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description status status ✓ The status to get emoji reactions for. Output Array - A list of the emoji reactions on this status. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: get status with ID (localid)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Look up a status by its local ID (i.e. ACKnNemqjYvEUbhgo4, 107094725323115556) Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description localid String ✓ The local ID of the status. Output status - The status, or NULL if it could not be found.

item.title: handle of user (user)
item.description: In Mastodon → Users Jump to block Get the @-handle of a user. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description user user ✓ The user to find the handle of. Output String - The user’s @-handle. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "

item.title: I (state) user (user)
item.description: In Mastodon → Users Jump to block Check the state of the bot’s relationship with a user. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description state any ✓ The state to check. user user ✓ The user to check relationship state with. Output Boolean - Whether the bot has the specified relationship with a user.

item.title: I voted on poll (poll)
item.description: In Mastodon → Polls Jump to block Check whether the current user voted on a particular poll. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description poll poll ✓ The poll to check. Output Boolean - Whether the current user voted on the specified poll. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: ID of status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Get the ID of a status Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description status status ✓ The status to get the ID from Output String - The ID of the status window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: initiator of notification (notification)
item.description: In Mastodon → Notifications Jump to block Get the user that initiated this notification. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description notification notification ✓ The notification to get the initiator of. Output user - The user that initiated this notification. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: initiator of reaction (reaction)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Get the user that initiated a reaction. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description reaction pleroma_reaction ✓ The reaction to get the initiator of. Output user - The user that the reaction was initiated by. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: instance maximum status length
item.description: In Mastodon → Instance Jump to block Get the maximum number of characters that can be included in a status on this instance. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Output Number - The maximum number of characters that can be included in a status, on this instance. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: items I voted for on poll (poll)
item.description: In Mastodon → Polls Jump to block Get the items the current user voted for on a poll in a status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description poll poll ✓ The poll to check. Output Array - The items the current user voted for on the poll in the specified status.

item.title: log on (token) (instance) (ignore_my_statuses) ignore my statuses in feeds (include_mentions) include mentions when replying
item.description: In Mastodon → Configuration Jump to block Log on to Mastodon with a token on an instance. To obtain a token, use Tools -> Mastodon token generator… Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description token any ✓ The access_token of the account to control instance any ✓ The instance the account to control is on. Do not include https:// ignore_my_statuses any ?

item.title: look up status with URL (apid)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Look up a status by its URL (i.e. https://outerheaven.club/notice/ACKnNemqjYvEUbhgo4, https://koyu.space/@koyuchan/107094725323115556) Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description apid String ✓ The URL of an ActivityPub-compatible activity URL. Output status - The status, or NULL if it could not be found.

item.title: look up user by handle (handle)
item.description: In Mastodon → Users Jump to block Look up a user by their @-handle. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description handle String ✓ The handle of the user (i.e. @blog@blog.piecewise.im) Output user - The user, or NULL if it could not be found. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: me
item.description: In Mastodon → Users Jump to block Get the user the bot is logged in as Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Output user - The user the bot is logged in as window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"type":"mastodon_user_me","message0":"%1 me","args0":[{"type":"field_image","src":"data:image/png;base64,","width":15,"height":15,"alt":"Mastodon"}],"output":["mastodon_user"],"doc_output":"The user the bot is logged in as","colour":30,"tooltip":"Get the user the bot is logged in as"

item.title: notification (notification) is (type)
item.description: In Mastodon → Notifications Jump to block Determine if a notification is of a particular type. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description notification notification ✓ The notification to check. type any ✓ The type to check. Output Boolean - Whether the notification is of the specified type.

item.title: number of votes for poll option (option) in poll (poll)
item.description: In Mastodon → Polls Jump to block Returns the number of votes for a given option in a given poll. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description option String ✓ The option to check. poll poll ✓ The poll to check. Output Number - The number of votes for a given option in a given poll.

item.title: original author of status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Get the original author of a post (i.e. a reblog). Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description status status ✓ The post to get the original author for. Output user - The original post, if this is a reblog; otherwise null.

item.title: poll in status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Polls Jump to block Get the attached poll, if any, in the provided status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description status status ✓ The status to get the attached poll of. Output poll - The poll. If there is no poll, returns null.

item.title: poll options in status (poll)
item.description: In Mastodon → Polls Jump to block Get the options of a particular poll. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description poll poll ✓ The poll to get the options of. Output Array - The options of the provided poll. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: poll with options (options) expires in (expires) allow multiple choices? (multiple)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses; Mastodon → Polls Jump to block Attach a poll with the specified options. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description options Array ✓ The options on this poll. expires time ✓ When this poll should close. multiple Boolean Whether users should be allowed to pick multiple choices.

item.title: scope of status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Get the scope (visibility) of a status. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description status status ✓ The status to get the scope of. Output scope window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: send status with content (content) spoiler/subject (spoiler) with scope (scope) in reply to (post) sensitive? (sensitive) as (format)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Post a status to Mastodon. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description content attachment OR String OR Array ✓ The content of the status. This can be an attachment, a poll, plain text, or an array of any of these. spoiler String The spoiler text/“subject” of this post.

item.title: send status with content (content) spoiler/subject (spoiler) with scope (scope) in reply to (post) sensitive? (sensitive) as (format)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Post a status to Mastodon. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description content attachment OR String OR Array ✓ The content of the status. This can be an attachment, a poll, plain text, or an array of any of these. spoiler String The spoiler text/“subject” of this post.

item.title: set my (field) to (name)
item.description: In Mastodon → Profile Jump to block Change the bot’s profile name. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description field any ✓ The field to edit name String ✓ The profile name to change to Output void - This is a statement with no outputs

item.title: status (status) is (property)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Check if a status matches a particular property. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description status status ✓ The status to check. property any ✓ The property to check. Output Boolean - Whether the status matches the selected property.

item.title: time poll (poll) ends
item.description: In Mastodon → Polls Jump to block Get the time when a particular ends. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description poll poll ✓ The poll to check. Output date - The time when the specified poll ends. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.

item.title: users that (stat) status (status)
item.description: In Mastodon → Statuses Jump to block Get the users that boosted/favourited/reblogged a particular status. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description stat any ✓ The stat to get. status status ✓ The status to get the favorites or reblogs of. Output Array window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: vote for poll option (option) in poll (poll)
item.description: In Mastodon → Polls Jump to block Vote for the specified poll option. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description option String OR Array ✓ The option or options to vote for. poll poll ✓ The poll to vote on. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs

item.title: winning item(s) in poll (poll)
item.description: In Mastodon → Polls Jump to block Get the winning option(s) of a poll. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description poll poll ✓ The poll to get the winner from Output Array - The winning option or options. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.

item.title: 📄 for each status from user (user) as (VAR)
item.description: In Mastodon → Users Jump to block Loop through every post from a user. 📄 Paginator: Paginators are incredibly useful and powerful, but come with some drawbacks and warnings. Click here to learn more about paginators. Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description user user ✓ The user to fetch the posts of. VAR any ? Output void - This is a statement with no outputs

item.title: 🔔 notification
item.description: In Mastodon → Events Jump to block The notification that is the target of this event. Only valid in: 🔔 when (event) do (statement) Only valid in events: notification Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Output notification - The notification that is the target of this event. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.onload = () = { const block = ({"

item.title: 🔔 status
item.description: In Mastodon → Events Jump to block The status that is the target of this event. Only valid in: 🔔 when (event) do (statement) Only valid in events: notification, update, update, update Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Output status - The status that is the target of this event. window.addEventListener("load", () = { let script = document.createElement("script"); script.src = "https://unpkg.com/blockly/blockly.min.js"; document.body.appendChild(script); script.

item.title: 🔔 when (event) do (statement)
item.description: In Mastodon → Events Jump to block Run statements when an event occurs. Requires the following blocks to be present in the project: mastodon login Parameters Parameter name Parameter type Required? Description event any ✓ The event to bind to. statement statements… ✓ The statements to run when the event is received. Output void - This is a statement with no outputs
